channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: What Newsom's team is telling allies in Congress about Trump's DOJ investigating him
item.description: California Gov. Gavin Newsom's team is urging congressional Democrats to frame the Justice Department's investigation into him as part of a campaign o...

item.title: AI deepfakes are reshaping American elections
item.description: Campaign ads now widely use AI-generated clips and images, including attack ads that depict candidates in fabricated scenarios.

item.title: FBI thwarted alleged plot targeting Trump's UFC event, Patel says
item.description: Multiple suspects are in custody after the FBI disrupted an alleged threat against President Trump's White House UFC event, according to FBI Director Kash Patel.

item.title: Trump's dispute with Anthropic becomes a cybersecurity issue
item.description: AI researchers and cybersecurity leaders worry the U.S. government is setting a precedent that may discourage American AI companies from developing security tools.
